description: Derived well and family index for labeller selectors.
sql: WITH base AS (SELECT site, frac_id, source_file, name, stage_num, created_ts, datetime_fmt, regexp_split_to_array(trim(name), '\s+') AS name_parts FROM datastore:historian_telemetry_v1 WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND datetime_fmt IS NOT NULL) SELECT site, frac_id, source_file, name, CASE WHEN cardinality(name_parts) = 0 THEN 'Unknown' WHEN cardinality(name_parts) = 1 THEN name_parts[1] WHEN cardinality(name_parts) = 2 THEN name_parts[1] || ' ' || name_parts[2] WHEN name_parts[3] ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN name_parts[1] || ' ' || name_parts[2] || ' ' || name_parts[3] ELSE name_parts[1] || ' ' || name_parts[2] END AS well_family, COUNT(*) AS sample_count, COUNT(DISTINCT stage_num) AS stage_count, MIN(stage_num) AS min_stage_num, MAX(stage_num) AS max_stage_num, CAST(MIN(datetime_fmt) AS TEXT) AS first_ts, CAST(MAX(datetime_fmt) AS TEXT) AS last_ts, CAST(MIN(created_ts) AS TEXT) AS first_created_ts, CAST(MAX(created_ts) AS TEXT) AS last_created_ts FROM base GROUP BY site, frac_id, source_file, name, well_family ORDER BY well_family ASC, name ASC
